en: And Saul approved of his execution. And there arose on that day a great persecution against the church in Jerusalem, and they were all scattered throughout the regions of Judea and Samaria, except the apostles.
zh: 司提反被害，掃羅也欣然同意。 從那天起，耶路撒冷的教會大受迫害；除了使徒以外，所有的人都分散到猶太和撒瑪利亞各地。

en: Devout men buried Stephen and made great lamentation over him.
zh: 有些虔誠的人安葬了司提反，為他大大悲痛一番。

en: But Saul was ravaging the church, and entering house after house, he dragged off men and women and committed them to prison.
zh: 掃羅卻殘害教會，逐家進去，連男帶女拉去坐監。

en: Now those who were scattered went about preaching the word.
zh: 那些分散的人，經過各地，傳揚福音真道。

en: Philip went down to the city of Samaria and proclaimed to them the Christ.
zh: 腓利下到撒瑪利亞城，宣講基督。

en: And the crowds with one accord paid attention to what was being said by Philip when they heard him and saw the signs that he did.
zh: 群眾聽了腓利所講的，看見他所行的神蹟，就同心聽從了他的話。

en: For unclean spirits came out of many who were possessed, crying with a loud voice, and many who were paralyzed or lame were healed.
zh: 許多人有污靈附在他們身上，污靈大聲喊叫了之後，就出來了；還有許多癱子瘸子都醫好了。

en: So there was much joy in that city.
zh: 在那城裡，就大有歡樂。

en: But there was a man named Simon, who had previously practiced magic in the city and amazed the people of Samaria, saying that he himself was somebody great.
zh: 有一個人名叫西門，從前在城裡行過邪術，使撒瑪利亞的居民驚奇，他又自命不凡，

en: They all paid attention to him, from the least to the greatest, saying, "This man is the power of God that is called Great."
zh: 城裡大大小小都聽從他，說：“這就是那稱為‘ 神的大能’的人。”

en: And they paid attention to him because for a long time he had amazed them with his magic.
zh: 他們聽從他，因為他長久用邪術，使他們驚奇。

en: But when they believed Philip as he preached good news about the kingdom of God and the name of Jesus Christ, they were baptized, both men and women.
zh: 等到腓利向他們傳了 神的國的福音，和耶穌基督的名，他們就信了腓利，連男帶女都受了洗。

en: Even Simon himself believed, and after being baptized he continued with Philip. And seeing signs and great miracles performed, he was amazed.
zh: 連西門自己也信了，他受洗之後，常和腓利在一起，看見所發生的神蹟和大能的事，就覺得很驚奇。

en: Now when the apostles at Jerusalem heard that Samaria had received the word of God, they sent to them Peter and John,
zh: 在耶路撒冷的使徒，聽見撒瑪利亞居民領受了 神的道，就差派彼得和約翰到他們那裡去。

en: who came down and prayed for them that they might receive the Holy Spirit,
zh: 二人到了，就為大家禱告，要讓他們接受聖靈。

en: for he had not yet fallen on any of them, but they had only been baptized in the name of the Lord Jesus.
zh: 因為聖靈還沒有降在他們任何一個身上，他們只是受了洗歸入主耶穌的名下。

en: Then they laid their hands on them and they received the Holy Spirit.
zh: 於是使徒為他們按手，他們就受了聖靈。

en: Now when Simon saw that the Spirit was given through the laying on of the apostles' hands, he offered them money,
zh: 西門看見使徒一按手，就有聖靈賜下來，就拿錢給他們，

en: saying, "Give me this power also, so that anyone on whom I lay my hands may receive the Holy Spirit."
zh: 說：“請把這權柄也給我，叫我為誰按手，誰就可以受聖靈。”

en: But Peter said to him, "May your silver perish with you, because you thought you could obtain the gift of God with money!
zh: 彼得對他說：“你的銀子跟你一同滅亡吧！因為你以為 神的恩賜，是可以用錢買的。

en: You have neither part nor lot in this matter, for your heart is not right before God.
zh: 你和這件事是毫無關係的，因為你在 神面前存心不正。

en: Repent, therefore, of this wickedness of yours, and pray to the Lord that, if possible, the intent of your heart may be forgiven you.
zh: 所以，你要悔改離棄這罪惡，要祈求主，也許你心中的意念可以得到赦免。

en: For I see that you are in the gall of bitterness and in the bond of iniquity."
zh: 我看出你正在苦膽之中，邪惡捆綁著你。”

en: And Simon answered, "Pray for me to the Lord, that nothing of what you have said may come upon me."
zh: 西門回答：“請你們為我求主，好讓你們所說的，沒有一樣臨到我身上。”

en: Now when they had testified and spoken the word of the Lord, they returned to Jerusalem, preaching the gospel to many villages of the Samaritans.
zh: 使徒作了見證，講了主的道，就回耶路撒冷去，一路上在撒瑪利亞人的許多村莊裡傳揚福音。

en: Now an angel of the Lord said to Philip, "Rise and go toward the south to the road that goes down from Jerusalem to Gaza." This is a desert place.
zh: 有主的一位使者對腓利說：“起來，向南走，往那從耶路撒冷下迦薩的路上去。”那條路在曠野裡。

en: And he rose and went. And there was an Ethiopian, a eunuch, a court official of Candace, queen of the Ethiopians, who was in charge of all her treasure. He had come to Jerusalem to worship
zh: 他就動身去了。有一個衣索匹亞人，是衣索匹亞女王干大基有權力的太監，掌管女王全部國庫。他上耶路撒冷去禮拜。

en: and was returning, seated in his chariot, and he was reading the prophet Isaiah.
zh: 他回去的時候，坐在車上讀以賽亞先知的書。

en: And the Spirit said to Philip, "Go over and join this chariot."
zh: 聖靈對腓利說：“你往前去，靠近那車子！”

en: So Philip ran to him and heard him reading Isaiah the prophet and asked, "Do you understand what you are reading?"
zh: 腓利就跑過去，聽見他讀以賽亞先知的書，就問他：“你所讀的，你明白嗎？”

en: And he said, "How can I, unless someone guides me?" And he invited Philip to come up and sit with him.
zh: 他說：“沒有人指導我，怎能明白呢？”於是請腓利上車，同他坐在一起。

en: Now the passage of the Scripture that he was reading was this: "Like a sheep he was led to the slaughter and like a lamb before its shearer is silent, so he opens not his mouth.
zh: 他所讀的那段經文，就是： “他像羊被牽去宰殺， 又像羊羔在剪毛的人面前無聲， 他總是這樣不開口。

en: In his humiliation justice was denied him. Who can describe his generation? For his life is taken away from the earth."
zh: 他受屈辱的時候， 得不到公平的審判， 誰能說出他的身世呢？ 因為他的生命從地上被奪去。”

en: And the eunuch said to Philip, "About whom, I ask you, does the prophet say this, about himself or about someone else?"
zh: 太監對腓利說：“請問先知這話是指誰說的？指他自己呢？還是指別人？”

en: Then Philip opened his mouth, and beginning with this Scripture he told him the good news about Jesus.
zh: 腓利就開口，從這段經文開始，向他傳講耶穌。

en: And as they were going along the road they came to some water, and the eunuch said, "See, here is water! What prevents me from being baptized?"
zh: 他們一路走，到了有水的地方，太監說：“你看，這裡有水，有甚麼可以阻止我受洗呢？”
於是太監吩咐停車，腓利和他兩人下到水中，腓利就給他施洗。

en: And he commanded the chariot to stop, and they both went down into the water, Philip and the eunuch, and he baptized him.
zh: 他們從水裡上來的時候，主的靈就把腓利提去了，太監再也看不見他，就歡歡喜喜地上路。

en: And when they came up out of the water, the Spirit of the Lord carried Philip away, and the eunuch saw him no more, and went on his way rejoicing.
zh: 後來有人在亞鎖都遇見腓利。他走遍各城，傳講福音，直到該撒利亞。

en: But Philip found himself at Azotus, and as he passed through he preached the gospel to all the towns until he came to Caesarea.
